## Service Access

Unlike the workflow page-centric libraries that use `StateStore` +
`InteractionContext` + session IDs, the management library is stateless.
Routes receive `ManagementService` directly via closure — no context
loader needed.

``` python
# Verify import
assert ManagementService is not None
print("routes.core imports OK")
```

    routes.core imports OK
